zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Hastings於1165年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾費隆格利時，他的父親William de Hastings35歲，母親Maud Banastre31歲。他於大約1202年與Margaret le Bigod在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1217年登記服兵役。他去世於1226年1月28日在英國諾福爾可阿希爾享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 艾德蒙達斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Hastings于1165年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾費隆格利时，他的父亲William de Hastings35岁，母亲Maud Banastre31岁。他于大约1202年与Margaret le Bigod在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1217年登记服兵役。他去世于1226年1月28日在英国諾福爾可阿希爾享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 艾德蒙達斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Hastings was born in 1165, in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Hastings, was 35 and his mother, Maud Banastre, was 31. He married Margaret le Bigod about 1202, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1217. He died on 28 January 1226, in Ashill, Norfolk, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Hastings est né en 1165, à Fillongley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Hastings, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Maud Banastre, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret le Bigod environ 1202, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1217. Il est décédé le 28 janvier 1226, à Ashill, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Januar 1226 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Ashill, Norfolk, England und wurde in St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suf: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 에드먼드'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: William de Hastings(이)가 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 피론글리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Hastings(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Banastre(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1202년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret le Bigod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1226년 1월 28일 영국 노르폴크 애시에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 에드먼드'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Hastings nasceu em 1165, em Fillongley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Hastings, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Maud Banastre, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret le Bigod aproximadamente 1202, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1217. Ele faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 1226, em Ashill, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Hastings родился в 1165 г. в местности филлонгли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Hastings было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Banastre, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret le Bigod около 1202 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. В 1217 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 28 января 1226 г. в местности ашилл, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности ст эдмунд'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Hastings nació en 1165, en Fillongley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Hastings, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Maud Banastre, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Margaret le Bigod aproximadamente 1202, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1217. Murió el 28 de enero de 1226, en Ashill, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
